title: Mastitis follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Lists thromboembolic symptoms, heavy bleeding, wound infection signs, fever, abdominal pain, wound discharge, severe headache, visual symptoms, and postpartum hypertensive complications.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed fever or infection concern only.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists thromboembolic symptoms, heavy bleeding, wound infection signs, fever, abdominal pain, wound discharge, severe headache, visual symptoms, and postpartum hypertensive complications.

exact_section.heading: Appendix 1 — medical risk indicators for mothers

examination.text: Requires maternal physical and emotional assessment, postpartum haemorrhage and hypertensive-risk screening, feeding support, family planning discussion, continuity, and EMR documentation.
examination.rationale: Supports actual maternal recovery and feeding context.
examination.evidence_extract: Requires maternal physical and emotional assessment, postpartum haemorrhage and hypertensive-risk screening, feeding support, family planning discussion, continuity, and EMR documentation.

exact_section.heading: 3.1 Core Components — maternal physical and emotional health, education, support, and continuity

examination.text: Specifies vital signs, uterine involution, lochia, wound healing, bladder and bowel function, feeding, mood, support, family planning, pelvic floor, indicated tests, and documented follow-up.
examination.rationale: Supports entered maternal, breast and feeding assessment without selecting management.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies vital signs, uterine involution, lochia, wound healing, bladder and bowel function, feeding, mood, support, family planning, pelvic floor, indicated tests, and documented follow-up.

exact_section.heading: Appendices 2 and 3 — detailed maternal postnatal and home-visit checks

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Prior diagnosis, postpartum and infant age, laterality, breast findings, fever, systemic state, feeding, treatment, adherence and response are absent.
No resolution, abscess, antibiotic, feeding instruction, imaging or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
